text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, January 04. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
